title: Don Juan Quilligan
writer: Arthur Kober, Frank Gabrielson, Herbert Clyde Lewis
actors: William Bendix, Joan Blondell, Phil Silvers
plot: In Brooklyn, N.Y., barge captain Patrick Michael Quilligan (William Bendix) falls for barmaid Margie Mossrock (Joan Blondell) because her charm reminds him of his beloved, deceased mother. Quilligan soon proposes, and Margie accep...
